CustomField.formula: CASE(TEXT(Event_Approver__r.Type__c), 'FLM Approver',$Label.hippoFLMApprover, 'Department Head Approver',$Label.hippoDepartmentHeadApprover, 'RSS Approver',$Label.hippoRSSApprover, 'Medical Approver',$Label.hippoMedicalApprover, 'Compliance Approver',$Label.hippoComplianceApprover, 'Global Compliance Approver',$Label.hippoGlobalComplianceApprover, 'Regional Compliance Approver',$Label.hippoRegionalComplianceApprover, 'European Compliance Approver',$Label.hippoEuropeanComplianceApprover, TEXT(Event_Approver__r.Type__c))
CustomField.label: Approver Step
